---
title: "Wildfires.jl"
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
using Wildfires
using Wildfires.Rothermel
using Wildfires.Rothermel: residence_time
using Wildfires.LevelSet
using Wildfires.LevelSet: xcoords, ycoords
using Wildfires.SpreadModels
using CairoMakie

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------# Thomas Fire elevation data (20x20 from Open-Meteo API)
# Anlauf Canyon, Ventura County, CA: 34.41°N–34.47°N, 119.03°W–118.97°W
const ELEV_COARSE = reshape(Float64[
    654, 742, 791, 840, 935, 1026, 1143, 1263, 1348, 1101, 934, 856, 754, 894, 1003, 1083, 1198, 1253, 1303, 1199,
    634, 676, 736, 806, 896, 983, 1115, 1256, 1377, 1190, 1087, 971, 833, 881, 968, 1078, 1201, 1301, 1399, 1345,
    689, 741, 741, 764, 865, 946, 1140, 1324, 1465, 1258, 1055, 938, 863, 943, 1061, 1124, 1218, 1292, 1360, 1488,
    723, 664, 682, 728, 794, 887, 1071, 1231, 1415, 1334, 1145, 1012, 969, 980, 1069, 1129, 1257, 1337, 1439, 1490,
    595, 622, 658, 700, 813, 980, 1164, 1287, 1375, 1395, 1205, 1049, 1046, 1064, 1130, 1191, 1284, 1364, 1426, 1479,
    570, 616, 653, 690, 836, 918, 1069, 1105, 1225, 1386, 1260, 1097, 1087, 1109, 1198, 1209, 1272, 1332, 1388, 1416,
    565, 619, 662, 697, 755, 810, 895, 1008, 1141, 1300, 1348, 1159, 1202, 1224, 1277, 1328, 1341, 1377, 1424, 1360,
    502, 614, 666, 784, 841, 959, 949, 1010, 1132, 1395, 1431, 1334, 1299, 1359, 1418, 1487, 1500, 1414, 1447, 1342,
    483, 543, 623, 710, 942, 1064, 1127, 1172, 1283, 1350, 1338, 1331, 1318, 1367, 1472, 1482, 1488, 1487, 1486, 1427,
    453, 575, 628, 727, 864, 901, 1062, 1232, 1344, 1241, 1169, 1297, 1329, 1380, 1452, 1457, 1469, 1468, 1475, 1439,
    528, 549, 604, 762, 935, 959, 1053, 1140, 1067, 1065, 1124, 1221, 1354, 1357, 1359, 1451, 1461, 1439, 1422, 1372,
    491, 568, 647, 806, 762, 798, 1006, 1005, 900, 1085, 1219, 1304, 1247, 1261, 1269, 1419, 1452, 1413, 1382, 1328,
    542, 633, 656, 665, 667, 808, 846, 842, 870, 1082, 1160, 1178, 1102, 1091, 1165, 1324, 1473, 1405, 1358, 1310,
    528, 561, 580, 586, 618, 648, 692, 772, 820, 981, 1154, 1055, 960, 937, 1154, 1267, 1457, 1393, 1315, 1277,
    474, 480, 485, 521, 606, 728, 847, 920, 1056, 1173, 1236, 1042, 886, 898, 1065, 1172, 1426, 1363, 1291, 1226,
    459, 410, 493, 566, 651, 819, 947, 1038, 1114, 1266, 1169, 1040, 859, 803, 1020, 1154, 1249, 1187, 1224, 1209,
    425, 431, 524, 617, 796, 859, 982, 1123, 1216, 1145, 1018, 917, 757, 804, 1114, 1203, 1082, 1064, 1132, 1151,
    332, 419, 488, 561, 705, 812, 922, 1040, 1020, 1066, 957, 832, 684, 705, 956, 1098, 886, 911, 1018, 1136,
    368, 412, 504, 561, 623, 746, 814, 829, 836, 1007, 904, 763, 651, 629, 864, 982, 798, 646, 821, 992,
    316, 403, 486, 513, 615, 667, 602, 692, 757, 944, 836, 701, 516, 602, 789, 922, 722, 557, 683, 846
], 20, 20)

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------# RealTerrain
struct RealTerrain <: AbstractTerrain
    elev::Matrix{Float64}
    domain_size::Float64
end

function _interp_elev(terrain::RealTerrain, x, y)
    N = size(terrain.elev, 1)
    fx = clamp(x / terrain.domain_size * (N - 1) + 1, 1.0, Float64(N))
    fy = clamp(y / terrain.domain_size * (N - 1) + 1, 1.0, Float64(N))
    i0 = clamp(floor(Int, fx), 1, N - 1)
    j0 = clamp(floor(Int, fy), 1, N - 1)
    dx = fx - i0
    dy = fy - j0
    z = terrain.elev
    (1 - dx) * (1 - dy) * z[i0, j0] + dx * (1 - dy) * z[i0+1, j0] +
    (1 - dx) * dy * z[i0, j0+1] + dx * dy * z[i0+1, j0+1]
end

function (terrain::RealTerrain)(t, x, y)
    h = terrain.domain_size / (size(terrain.elev, 1) - 1) * 0.5
    zxp = _interp_elev(terrain, x + h, y)
    zxm = _interp_elev(terrain, x - h, y)
    zyp = _interp_elev(terrain, x, y + h)
    zym = _interp_elev(terrain, x, y - h)
    dzdx = (zxp - zxm) / (2h)
    dzdy = (zyp - zym) / (2h)
    slope = hypot(dzdx, dzdy)
    aspect = atan(dzdy, dzdx) + π
    return (slope, aspect)
end

elevation(terrain::RealTerrain, x, y) = _interp_elev(terrain, x, y)

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------# Simulation
terrain_hero = RealTerrain(ELEV_COARSE, 6000.0)
M_hero = FuelClasses(d1=0.06, d10=0.07, d100=0.08, herb=0.0, wood=0.0)
wind_hero = UniformWind(speed=12.0, direction=π/6)
grid_hero = LevelSetGrid(200, 200, dx=30.0)
ignite!(grid_hero, 3000.0, 3000.0, 50.0)
t_r_hero = residence_time(CHAPARRAL)
model_hero = RothermelModel(CHAPARRAL, wind_hero, UniformMoisture(M_hero),
    terrain_hero, EllipticalBlending())
trace_hero = Trace(grid_hero, 3)
simulate!(grid_hero, model_hero, steps=200, dt=0.5, trace=trace_hero, burnout=ExponentialBurnout(t_r_hero))

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------# Inlined fire colormap helpers
_FIRE_CMAP = cgrad([:black, :red, :yellow, :white, :green], [0.0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0])

function _fire_values(φ, t_ignite, t_now, t_r)
    vals = similar(φ)
    φ_max = maximum(x -> x > 0 ? x : zero(x), φ)
    φ_max = φ_max > 0 ? φ_max : one(φ_max)
    for j in axes(φ, 2), i in axes(φ, 1)
        t_ig = t_ignite[i, j]
        if isnan(t_ig)
            vals[i, j] = zero(eltype(vals))
        elseif isfinite(t_ig) && t_ig <= t_now
            vals[i, j] = -clamp((t_now - t_ig) / t_r, 0, 1)
        else
            vals[i, j] = clamp(φ[i, j] / φ_max, 0, 1)
        end
    end
    vals
end

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------# Wind particles
wind_dir_hero = π / 6
n_particles = 80
xs_grid = collect(xcoords(grid_hero))
ys_grid = collect(ycoords(grid_hero))
xmin, xmax = first(xs_grid), last(xs_grid)
ymin, ymax = first(ys_grid), last(ys_grid)
particle_x = rand(n_particles) .* (xmax - xmin) .+ xmin
particle_y = rand(n_particles) .* (ymax - ymin) .+ ymin
particle_speed = 120.0  # m per frame (visual scaling)
wind_dx = -cos(wind_dir_hero)
wind_dy = -sin(wind_dir_hero)

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------# Elevation grid for contours
elev_grid = [elevation(terrain_hero, x, y) for x in xs_grid, y in ys_grid]

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------# Record GIF
fig_hero = Figure(size=(500, 450))
ax_hero = Axis(fig_hero[1, 1], aspect=DataAspect(), xlabel="x (m)", ylabel="y (m)")

record(fig_hero, joinpath(@__DIR__, "hero.gif"), eachindex(trace_hero.stack); framerate=15) do idx
    empty!(ax_hero)
    t, φ = trace_hero.stack[idx]
    ax_hero.title = "t = $(round(t, digits=1)) min"

    # Fire heatmap
    vals = _fire_values(φ, collect(grid_hero.t_ignite), t, t_r_hero)
    heatmap!(ax_hero, xs_grid, ys_grid, vals; colormap=_FIRE_CMAP, colorrange=(-1, 1))

    # Terrain contours
    contour!(ax_hero, xs_grid, ys_grid, elev_grid;
        levels=8, color=:gray60, linewidth=0.7)

    # Fire front
    contour!(ax_hero, xs_grid, ys_grid, φ; levels=[0.0], color=:black, linewidth=2.0)

    # Wind particles
    particle_x .= mod.(particle_x .+ particle_speed .* wind_dx .- xmin, xmax - xmin) .+ xmin
    particle_y .= mod.(particle_y .+ particle_speed .* wind_dy .- ymin, ymax - ymin) .+ ymin
    scatter!(ax_hero, particle_x, particle_y;
        markersize=4, color=(:white, 0.4), strokewidth=0)
end
```

![](hero.gif){fig-align="center" width="500"}

Welcome to the documentation for **Wildfires.jl**.

## Overview

Wildfires.jl is a Julia package for wildfire modeling and simulation, built around three core modules:

- **[Rothermel](rothermel.qmd)** — The Rothermel (1972) surface fire spread model with the 13 standard NFFL fuel models from Anderson (1982).
- **[Level Set](levelset.qmd)** — A level set method for simulating 2D fire front propagation driven by spatially varying spread rates.
- **[Spread Model](spreadmodel.qmd)** — Composable, differentiable components (wind, moisture, terrain) that drive level set simulations via `RothermelModel`
- **[GPU Acceleration](gpu.qmd)** — Backend-agnostic GPU support (CUDA, Metal, ROCm) via KernelAbstractions.jl for large-grid simulations.

## Installation

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add("Wildfires")
```

## Quick Example

```{julia}
using Wildfires
using Wildfires.Rothermel
using Wildfires.LevelSet
using Wildfires.SpreadModels

# Build a fire spread model from components
moisture = FuelClasses(d1=0.06, d10=0.07, d100=0.08, herb=0.0, wood=0.0)
model = RothermelModel(SHORT_GRASS, UniformWind(speed=8.0), UniformMoisture(moisture), FlatTerrain())

# Evaluate spread rate at a point
ros = model(0.0, 100.0, 100.0)
println("Rate of spread: $(round(ros, digits=1)) m/min")
```

See [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd) for a full walkthrough.
